title: Deep Strategy Idea-Source Review (selection / research only)

provenance.head_note: HEAD 73e1cb0 is a descendant of the S29-D4 decision-record commit 9d5b9d8; 9d5b9d8 verified ancestor of HEAD; no agentic_factory file touched by automation between 9d5b9d8 and HEAD; factory tree clean, nothing staged.

1_parked_branch_lessons.dominant_universal_failure: Top-winner / fat-tail dependence: ALL FIVE parked branches fail the top-3-winner-removal gate. Each is a small-N single-instrument directional trigger whose thin net hinges on a handful of fat-tail captures, which is indistinguishable from luck.

branches.donchian_s23_s25: PARKED. ENTRY_EDGE_NOT_SUPPORTED; net flips negative ex-top-3 (IS -3.82, OOS -1.93); OOS 16 trades; bootstrap P(total<=0)=20.9%; DD was path luck.
branches.s26_trend_sr_ema_rsi: PARKED (PARK_CANDIDATE). Thin IS edge ~0.06R; ENTRY_EDGE_INCONCLUSIVE (not distinct from trend filter); FRICTION_SENSITIVE (neg at 0.10R); post-2016-only with 2014-2016 collapse; OOS single-year-dominated.
branches.s27_mean_reversion_bull: PARKED (IS_FAIL). Net -1.75R; 18 trades (<25 floor); PF 0.84; exp -0.097R; 3/10 positive years; top-3 removal -6.25R; over-stacked confirmation starved sample.
branches.s28_breakout_retest: PARKED (IS_FAIL). Net -0.72R; 12 trades in 10 years; PF 0.91; exp -0.06R; 3/10 positive; top-3 removal -6.72R; 5-filter stack on raw breakout = clean negative.
branches.s29_failed_breakout_reversal: PARKED (IS_FAIL). Failed the IS gate despite being the inverse of a raw breakout; the breakout family is now exhausted on this data.

secondary_failures: Low trade count from over-stacked filters (S27=18, S28=12).
Thin expectancy with no friction headroom (S26 ~0.06R, S29) -> dies at >=0.10R/trade cost.
Entry edge not distinct from the regime/trend filter (S26 INCONCLUSIVE).
Regime / calendar concentration (S26 post-2016-only; 2014-2016 chop sank it; OOS single-year-dominated).
Raw breakout / breakout-retest / failed-breakout family fails IS every time (Donchian, S28, S29).
what_s30_must_avoid: Single-instrument small-N directional triggers (all fail the top-3 gate).
Edges < ~0.10R expectancy or that ride a trend filter.
Anything needing data not available offline.

2_scoring_framework.scale: each criterion scored Low / Med / High

criteria.C1_causal_reason: Concrete economic/structural mechanism, not a chart shape.
criteria.C2_entry_significance_testable: Trigger testable vs random-day AND a structural null, isolating the claimed cause.
criteria.C3_expected_trade_count: Comfortably clears >=40 IS floor; ideally hundreds.
criteria.C5_multi_market_testability: Independently confirmable on a genuinely separate instrument (NQ<->ES; micros NOT independent).
criteria.C6_regime_robustness: Edge not dependent on one regime; survives 2014-2016 chop and post-2016 trend.
criteria.C7_daily_data_suitability: Fully expressible on daily OHLCV with no intraday path dependency.
criteria.C8_low_top_winner_dependence: Edge is the average of many small bets; net stays positive ex-top-3. THE gate that killed every parked branch.
criteria.C10_no_new_data_needed: High = uses existing offline NQ/ES/MNQ/MES daily CSVs; Low = needs data we lack.

offline_data_on_hand.not_available: no intraday, no term-structure/individual-contract series, no breadth, no other markets (no YM/Dow, no RTY/Russell)
offline_data_on_hand.micros_note: MNQ/MES are same-underlying proxies; descriptive only, never independent confirmation.

3_candidate_comparison.biggest_failure_mode: Re-inherits the unproven raw-breakout entry (exhausted breakout family).
Thin per-gap edge eroded by cost (friction-fragile, S26 risk).
Small per-day edge vs friction; and futures open/close prints may not match the true overnight session -> mis-measured legs.
3_candidate_comparison.similarity_to_parked: None -- a many-bet anomaly-harvest, not a small-N directional trigger.

3_candidate_comparison.biggest_failure_mode: Directionless compression->expansion; same breakout-direction problem as #1.

3_candidate_comparison.idea: Trend exhaustion after consecutive large-range days
3_candidate_comparison.biggest_failure_mode: Fades the structural index drift -> bleeds in persistent trends (S27 echo).
Calendar-effect overfitting (best-of-N window search) -> MUST hard-freeze the window definition before any run, no sweeps.
Consumes BOTH NQ and ES as inputs -> no independent confirmation market left (disqualifying for our validation discipline).
No standalone entries -> entry significance untestable; it is a filter, not a strategy. Repurpose as a future factory overlay.
Requires individual-contract / term-structure series NOT available offline -> cannot test. Disqualified on data, not merit.
Crashes are rare -> small-N, event-/fat-tail-concentrated (the exact top-3 gate that parked everything).

4_ranking: 1. #3 Overnight session-return decomposition -- only idea that structurally defeats the top-3-winner gate (hundreds of small independent bets), causal risk-premium mechanism, native daily fit, NQ/ES independent, regime-robust, clean entry-significance. Binding open question = friction.
2. #6 Turn-of-month / weekday calendar -- also a many-bet structural-flow edge, regime-robust, distinct; behind #3 on count and a sharper overfit temptation requiring a hard-frozen window.
3. #2 Gap continuation/fade -- high count, daily-feasible, but thin per-event edge -> friction-fragile (S26 risk).
4. #7 Cross-market RS NQ vs ES -- distinct, but consumes both instruments -> no independent confirmation market (disqualifying).
5. #1 / #4 Vol-contraction & inside-bar breakouts -- re-inherit the exhausted IS-failing raw-breakout family.
6. #5 / #10 Exhaustion fade & crash-recovery -- regime-/event-concentrated, small-N, top-winner-dependent (S27/S29 echoes).
7. #9 Carry/term-structure -- strong idea, no data offline -> cannot test.
8. #8 Vol-regime overlay -- not a standalone strategy (no entries); a future factory overlay, not an S30 branch.

5_final_recommendation.selected: Overnight session-return decomposition (overnight-drift anomaly) on daily NQ (primary) / ES (independent confirmation).
why_better_than_parked: Direct antidote to the one failure all five parked branches share: it is the average of hundreds of independent daily bets, so its net cannot be dominated by 3 fat-tail winners -> attacks the top-3 gate at the root.

Causal, not chart-shaped (beats S26 INCONCLUSIVE): a named economic mechanism (overnight risk premium / inventory rebalancing); entry significance cleanly testable as overnight leg vs day-session leg vs random close-to-close.
Trade count is a non-issue (beats S27=18 / S28=12): every session is a bet -> thousands over 2013-2022, no filter-stacking.
Not a breakout (beats Donchian/S28/S29): outside the exhausted breakout family entirely.
Regime-robust (beats S26 post-2016/2014-2016 split): an all-days average, not a regime bet.
5_final_recommendation.binding_caveat: The per-day overnight edge is SMALL. The decisive pre-registered S30-D2 tests are (a) friction survival at >=0.10R/trade as a hard FAIL gate, and (b) measurement validity -- whether the offline daily futures open/close prints actually bracket the true overnight (cash close-to-open) session; settlement-timing smear would mis-measure the legs. These must be checked BEFORE any optimism.
5_final_recommendation.not_a_forced_winner: This is not a 'force a winner' selection. #3 is structurally distinct, data-feasible, causal, and high-count, genuinely breaking the documented failure pattern. Had the field been only breakout re-skins and small-N fades, the correct answer would have been NO_STRATEGY_SELECTED. It is not.

6_proposed_next_step.step: S30-D2 (frozen strategy specification, spec only) -- ONLY if separately authorized
contents: Freeze before any run: exact leg definitions (close->open overnight, open->close day), position rule, R/accounting convention, and friction floor as a hard pre-registered FAIL gate (>=0.10R/trade).
Pre-register entry-significance: overnight vs day-session vs random close-to-close null; fixed horizons; EDGE_LIKELY required (not INCONCLUSIVE).
Pre-register a measurement-validity check (futures open/close vs true overnight window) as a gating step that can kill the branch before IS.
IS 2013-2022 only; OOS 2023-2025 sealed until the OOS protocol is committed.
NQ primary, ES independent confirmation; MNQ/MES descriptive only.
No code, backtest, IS/OOS, optimization, sweep, data fetch, paper, or live in S30-D2 -- spec only, exactly like S29-D2.
6_proposed_next_step.authorization_note: S30-D2 is NOT authorized by this memo. It requires a separate explicit instruction.

8_final_line: S30-D1 is idea-source review only; no strategy code, backtest, OOS, optimization, paper trading, or live trading is authorized.
trading_recommendation: NONE. Idea-source review only. Donchian, S26, S27, S28, and S29 remain PARKED; no active strategy; no paper/live system exists or is authorized. The selected hypothesis (overnight session-return decomposition) is a research direction to be frozen and tested under the factory ladder, not a trade.
